view.title: Validate persona scenario #4
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the foreign key constraints related to sharing templates across businesses.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 4 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the foreign key constraints related to sharing templates across businesses.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the foreign key constraints related to sharing templates across businesses.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario where a persona attempts to share a template across businesses. However, there is no evidence provided that explicitly checks for the enforcement of foreign key constraints or the expected behavior when such a sharing attempt is made. The existing evidence focuses on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, such as booking confirmations and unauthorized access attempts, but does not address the specific requirement of validating the sharing functionality, leading to an inconclusive status.
